g.text: Step 1: Enemy's turn (Goblin executes basic attack on Warrior)
Step 2: Player's turn (Warrior defends against next attack)
Step 3: Enemy's turn (Goblin executes basic attack, causing lower damage)
Step 4: Player's turn (Warrior executes Shield Bash on Goblin)
Step 5: Enemy's turn (Goblin is stunned, skips turn)
Step 6: Player's turn (Warrior uses Potion to heal)
Step 7: Enemy's turn (Goblin is stunned, skips turn)
Stun duration decreases to zero here
Step 8: Player's turn (Warrior executes basic attack, eliminating Goblin)
